feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Community
feed.subtitle: SAP Community Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: sap analytics cloud
entry.content: Is there any way to do joins of table in modeler in sac?

entry.title: Exceed Budget in posting MIRO Invoice for PR, PO in WBS
entry.content:
Hello guys, I have a problem like this:

1. I created project, WBS level 1 level 2, Network, Activity (internal) and Material Component.

2. I released project and assign budget for the project in cj30, and cj32.

3. I used the PR created in the Material Component to create PO and it charged commitment budget to my WBS and network activity.

4. I post goods receipt and then go to MIRO t-code.

5. I posted invoice for the PO that created from the PR of the material component and the system raise the error: In document item 003 Ntwk actvty 310000057 0010, budget for WBS element O.999987 for fiscal year 2024 was exceeded by 200.000.000 VND.

Although I have budgeted and released the budget for the WBS, there were 200.000.000 VND in the commitment and the MIRO didn't take it and raise the error: Budget Exceed.

Please help me with this problem.

entry.title: SAP FICO Certification
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am preparing for FICO certification doing practice and i need guidance how to apply for exam and any book suggestion for SAP FICO.

also kindly suggest how to move to SAP FICO Team am part of financial team for 12 years

 

Regards,

Sairam.N

entry.title: Best practices using SAP_ALL for implementations
entry.content:
Hi there, 

I am currently leading the end-to-end implementation of the embedded EWM module. As we approach the cutover phase in the client’s production environment, I have requested broad access permissions to perform certain client-specific technical activities. These activities often involve complex object configurations that do not follow the typical transport order process. Given these requirements, I believe it is necessary to have a temporary, consultant-level user role with SAP_ALL access. However, the client has raised concerns about audit compliance and is hesitant to grant this access.

Is there any official documentation or best practice guideline available that supports the need for extended permissions during critical implementation phases? This would help the client understand the necessity of SAP_ALL for certain technical tasks during cutover and allow us to proceed effectively

Thanks in advance

entry.title: best way to reach out to Moderators?
entry.content:
Hi All,

I had lost access to my old account, got comment from a moderator to send an email to Community@sap.com. I am sending emails for last few days, but got no acknowledgment. Is there any better way to reach out to the team, than sending email to the above address? Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Meaningless "posted a topic/replied to topic", instead use "question", "discussion", "blog article"
entry.content:
I see in my Notification feed questions, discussions and blog posts which are all tagged "posted a new topic" or "replied to topic", and I need to look at the picture to know if it's a question, a blog post or even a discussion. It has taken me months to change my habit from going from the text to the picture, in fact I have to look at both parts, the kind of topic, and the topic title. Why not having the whole information in the text? Proposing to replace "topic" with either "question", "discussion" or "blog article".

Here, it's a question:

It's a blog post:

It's a discussion:

Surprisingly, "topic" is not used in "commented on blog article":

Thank you.

Sandra

entry.title: SAP Blog in Awaiting Review
entry.content: How long it will take for moderators to approve the blog. My blog is in Awaiting Review for more than a week

entry.title: Archiving DBTABLOG, lot of POWL_SELCRIT records
entry.content:
We are in process of doing Archiving of DBTABLOG, and I can see that the majority of records are related to POWL_SELCRIT.

Is there any reason to keep those archives, or can we just delete the archive related to POWL_SELCRIT table in DBTABLOG.

Should we just turn off logging for POWL_SELCRIT?

entry.title: Where are my blogs I have linkedin my IDs and now what I have is a new id with no historical data
entry.content:
PL advise where are my previous blogs , posts, questions etc

Why do SAP have to keep changing something that works

entry.title: Improve Community 2024 feed to append "and X other people" to "mentioned you"
entry.content:
In my Notification feed, I receive messages like this:

In fact, the message targets a bunch of people, so it's not really a message targeting me specifically:

Is it possible to change the message "@mentioned you in" to "@mentioned you and 11 other people in"?

Thank you.

Sandra

entry.title: How to influence Community 2024 developments?
entry.content:
Is there an official way to contact SAP Community to ask for some fixes or improvements of https://community.sap.com? Right now, I'm posting them at Questions about SAP Websites | SAP Community, hoping that SAP people are looking at it...

I couldn't find any "SAP Community" group at https://influence.sap.com.

EDIT: posting to Questions about SAP Websites | SAP Community seems the right path, as can be inferred from these two replies by @AnnePetteroe: Improve Community 2024 feed to append "and X other... - SAP Community and Meaningless "posted a topic/replied to topic", ins... - SAP Community.

entry.title: Where can I find my bookmarks in Community 2024?
entry.content: I can bookmark questions and other pages, but where can I find them later?

entry.title: Random P-User selected during login to Community 2024 (I can't choose)
entry.content:
Hello,

This is an email I have just sent to sso@sap.com and community@sap.com. I post it in Community 2024 in case other people have the same issue.

When I log in to Notification feed - SAP Community every morning under my SAP Universal ID (primary email address: xxxxxxxxxxxxx@gmail.com), there’s no popup asking me under which account I want to login, it defaults to a linked P-User that I hadn’t use for days or months, it doesn’t select the last user I have used (S-User).

If I then go to Services & Support - SAP for Me, of course there’s an issue because the current account is a P-User instead of a S-User, so I have to log out and log in to Services & Support - SAP for Me, there’s a popup from which I can select my S-User.

If I log out, restart Edge, log in to Notification feed - SAP Community again, my P-User is selected again by default, instead of selecting the last used account (the S-user).

For information, the popup is also shown if I log in to SAP Developer Center | Official Resources for SAP Developers.

Is it possible to either select by default the last used account or let the user choose any of the linked accounts?

Workaround: I could unlink all my P-Users from my SAP Universal ID/secondary email address xxxxxxxxxxx@mycompany.com, but it’s the worst solution of course.

Steps to reproduce:

  1. Start Edge
  2. Start inPrivate window
  3. Login to https://community.sap.com/t5/notificationfeed/page
  4. Use of my SAP Universal ID primary email address: xxxxxxxxxxxx@gmail.com.
    Click Next.
  5. Type the password.
    Click Sign in.

  6.  

    PROBLEM: I cannot select which linked account I want to use; the Community page is shown, which means that one account was automatically selected (I don’t know which one).
  7. Login to https://me.sap.com/servicessupport/knowledge.
    PROBLEM: weird message “Due to inactivity…” Click “click here”.
  8. PROBLEM: click the user settings, you can see that a random P-User account was selected by the Community login.
  9. For information, here are my linked accounts (SAP Universal ID Account Manager😞

For comparison, I don’t have any issue if I first login via Services & Support - SAP for Me, I can select my account:

  1. Start Edge
  2. Start inPrivate window
  3. Login to https://me.sap.com/servicessupport/knowledge.
  4. Use of my SAP Universal ID primary email address: xxxxxxxxxxx@gmail.com.
    Click Next.
  5. Type the password.
    Click Sign in.
  6. GOOD, I can select the account I want:

  7. For information, if I now go to https://community.sap.com/t5/notificationfeed/page, it considers the current login correctly:

entry.title: Can the field Location be selected correctly?
entry.content:
Hi Community Expert,

Can the field Locatin be selected correctly? or only SAP successfactors related location can be selected? I want to choose SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, but it failed....

entry.title: Cannot see community.sap.com attached graphs
entry.content:
Good afternoon,

I am trying to see the entire content of the following blog:

https://community.sap.com/t5/additional-blogs-by-members/same-day-ach-how-to-set-up-your-sap-system-1-of-2/ba-p/13133409#:~:text=Same%2DDay%20ACH%20lessens%20outstanding,three%20settlement%20windows%20each%20day.

but only the text is shown, when I try to display/download the graphs, I receive the following error:

403. That’s an error.

Your client does not have permission to get URL /gsBIXI-VD6YqHD_U-DayhzGfP7YDwbuYgPGxp5w34Car4pbCmujKSSZFz7hN8A9XxfMp-xsrm94oVDMJhNeLT8zY-30tpWc7DJEr099My2OfObsxUVXoZ9xiByAybiUW3NoWcqM from this server. (Client IP address: 147.161.190.118)
ACL Denied That’s all we know.

Please help.

Regards, Armando

entry.title: How can I add code formatting in a comment in response to a question on the SAP Community page?
entry.content:
Hello poweruser of this community platform!

I have recently experienced a situation where a question in the Technology area got my attention and I did not feel like my response was wroth an answer but rather a comment. I needed to add some lines of code but in the comment section I can only hit enter to submit my post but have no option to add formatted text like a list of entries or even a code snippet. Can someone link me a guide or tell me how to do it?

Kind regards!

PS: Or is it simply "open a new tab, start a question and use the editor, copy the text and insert it in the comment field + close the question tab"?

entry.title: Polluted by many questions NOT about SAP Websites in Community 2024
entry.content:
There are two big issues in the Q&A of Community 2024: people using the button "Answer" (means "give solution") to just comment without giving a solution (the issue was addressed, let's see if that improves), and the other one is:

Half of my inbox is polluted by people asking a non-SAP-Websites question in the group "Question about SAP Websites".

The reason is clear for me, they don't know where to post their SAP question, even if they search, they don't find the right group:

  • The top menu contains "Products and Technology > Questions about SAP Websites", they choose it because they don't see a group corresponding to their question and because it contains the word "SAP" (lazy solution of course).
  • The top level "Create a post" is missing a search field, so they can't find easily, and they choose the easiest choice "Questions about SAP Websites".

     

  • Even if a search field existed, make sure to extend the search to the group description, e.g. there's no group "sap business one", the right group is ERP Q&A ("SAP Business One" is in the group description):

The six first months, I did tell the Original Poster that the question was posted to the wrong group, then I decided to alert the moderator to move the question to the right group.

No idea what's the best solution.

Is that in the list of planned enhancements? If not, could you add it?

Thank you.

Sandra

entry.title: create a blog button is disabled. Could anyone please help me to enable it.
What kind of html tags are supported?
entry.content:
Everytime i write a blog post and paste html content in or edit and old blog post i get the error that some html tags are unsupported.
Unfortunately i don´t get which one are supported and which not.

Is there a overview of all allowed/supprted html tags so i can avoid or correct it?

entry.title: Badges are not showing
entry.content: Why my earned badges are not showing in my profile that  i have earned in sap tutorial .
